Uses of Package
com.wip.entity

Packages that use com.wip.entity
Package
Description
com.wip.entity
 
com.wip.repository
 
com.wip.security
 
  • Classes in com.wip.entity used by com.wip.entity
    Class
    Description
    AppUser
    JPA entity representing a registered application user.
    Customer
    JPA entity representing a customer in the courier tracking system.
    Parcel
    JPA entity representing a courier parcel booking in the tracking system.
    Shipment
    JPA entity representing a shipment dispatched for a parcel in the courier tracking system.
    TrackingUpdate
    JPA entity representing a single tracking event for a shipment in the courier tracking system.

    Description
    AppUser
    JPA entity representing a registered application user.

    Shipment
    JPA entity representing a shipment dispatched for a parcel in the courier tracking system.
    TrackingUpdate
    JPA entity representing a single tracking event for a shipment in the courier tracking system.
